english translation text:
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
At Tur – The Mount

By the star when it sets:
An Najm – The Star

your companion has neither gone astray, nor amiss.
An Najm – The Star

Nor does he speak out of [his own] desire:
An Najm – The Star

it is just a revelation that is revealed [to him],
An Najm – The Star

taught him by one of great powers,
An Najm – The Star

possessed of sound judgement. He settled,
An Najm – The Star

while he was on the highest horizon.
An Najm – The Star

Then he drew nearer and nearer
An Najm – The Star

until he was within two bows’ length or even nearer,
An Najm – The Star

whereat He revealed to His servant whatever He revealed.
An Najm – The Star

The heart did not deny what it saw.
An Najm – The Star

Will you then dispute with him about what he saw?!
An Najm – The Star

Certainly he saw it yet another time,
An Najm – The Star

by the Lote Tree of the Ultimate Boundary,
An Najm – The Star

near which is the Garden of the Abode,
An Najm – The Star

when there covered the Lote Tree what covered it.
An Najm – The Star

His gaze did not swerve, nor did it overstep the bounds.
An Najm – The Star

arabic text: لَقَدْ رَأَىٰ مِنْ آيَاتِ رَبِّهِ الْكُبْرَىٰ
english translation text:
Certainly he saw some of the greatest signs of his Lord.
An Najm – The Star

Have you considered Lat and ‘Uzza?
An Najm – The Star

and Manat, the third one?
An Najm – The Star

Are you to have males and He females?
An Najm – The Star

That, then, will be an unfair division!
An Najm – The Star

arabic text: إِنْ هِيَ إِلَّا أَسْمَاءٌ سَمَّيْتُمُوهَا أَنتُمْ وَآبَاؤُكُم مَّا أَنزَلَ اللَّهُ بِهَا مِن سُلْطَانٍ ۚ إِن يَتَّبِعُونَ إِلَّا الظَّنَّ وَمَا تَهْوَى الْأَنفُسُ ۖ وَلَقَدْ جَاءَهُم مِّن رَّبِّهِمُ الْهُدَىٰ
english translation text:
These are but names, which you have coined—you and your fathers—for which Allah has not sent down any authority. They follow nothing but conjectures and the desires of the [lower] soul, while there has already come to them the guidance from their Lord.
An Najm – The Star

Shall man have whatever he yearns for?
An Najm – The Star

Yet to Allah belong this world and the Hereafter.
An Najm – The Star

arabic text: وَكَم مِّن مَّلَكٍ فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ لَا تُغْنِي شَفَاعَتُهُمْ شَيْئًا إِلَّا مِن بَعْدِ أَن يَأْذَنَ اللَّهُ لِمَن يَشَاءُ وَيَرْضَىٰ
english translation text:
How many an angel there is in the heavens whose intercession is of not any avail, except after Allah permits whomever He wishes and approves of!
An Najm – The Star

arabic text: إِنَّ الَّذِينَ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ بِالْآخِرَةِ لَيُسَمُّونَ الْمَلَائِكَةَ تَسْمِيَةَ الْأُنثَىٰ
english translation text:
Indeed those who do not believe in the Hereafter give female names to the angels.
An Najm – The Star

arabic text: وَمَا لَهُم بِهِ مِنْ عِلْمٍ ۖ إِن يَتَّبِعُونَ إِلَّا الظَّنَّ ۖ وَإِنَّ الظَّنَّ لَا يُغْنِي مِنَ الْحَقِّ شَيْئًا
english translation text:
They do not have any knowledge of that. They follow nothing but conjectures, and conjecture is no substitute for the truth.
An Najm – The Star

arabic text: فَأَعْرِضْ عَن مَّن تَوَلَّىٰ عَن ذِكْرِنَا وَلَمْ يُرِدْ إِلَّا الْحَيَاةَ الدُّنْيَا
english translation text:
So avoid those who turn away from Our remembrance and desire nothing but the life of the world.
An Najm – The Star

arabic text: ذَٰلِكَ مَبْلَغُهُم مِّنَ الْعِلْمِ ۚ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَن ضَلَّ عَن سَبِيلِهِ وَهُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَنِ اهْتَدَىٰ
english translation text:
That is the ultimate reach of their knowledge. Indeed your Lord knows best those who stray from His way, and He knows best those who are [rightly] guided.
An Najm – The Star

arabic text: وَلِلَّهِ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ لِيَجْزِيَ الَّذِينَ أَسَاءُوا بِمَا عَمِلُوا وَيَجْزِيَ الَّذِينَ أَحْسَنُوا بِالْحُسْنَى
english translation text:
To Allah belongs whatever is in the heavens and whatever is in the earth, that He may requite those who do evil for what they have done, and reward those who do good with the best [of rewards].
An Najm – The Star

arabic text: الَّذِينَ يَجْتَنِبُونَ كَبَائِرَ الْإِثْمِ وَالْفَوَاحِشَ إِلَّا اللَّمَمَ ۚ إِنَّ رَبَّكَ وَاسِعُ الْمَغْفِرَةِ ۚ
english translation text:
Those who avoid major sins and indecencies, apart from [minor and occasional] lapses. Indeed your Lord is expansive in [His] forgiveness.
An Najm – The Star

arabic text: هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِكُمْ إِذْ أَنشَأَكُم مِّنَ الْأَرْضِ وَإِذْ أَنتُمْ أَجِنَّةٌ فِي بُطُونِ أُمَّهَاتِكُمْ ۖ فَلَا تُزَكُّوا أَنفُسَكُمْ ۖ هُوَ أَعْلَمُ بِمَنِ اتَّقَىٰ
english translation text:
He knows you best since [the time] He produced you from the earth and since you were foetuses in the bellies of your mothers. So do not flaunt your piety: He knows best those who are Godwary.
An Najm – The Star

Did you see him who turned away,
An Najm – The Star

gave a little and held off?
An Najm – The Star

Does he have the knowledge of the Unseen so that he sees?
An Najm – The Star

arabic text: أَمْ لَمْ يُنَبَّأْ بِمَا فِي صُحُفِ مُوسَىٰ
english translation text:
Has he not been informed of what is in the scriptures of Moses,
An Najm – The Star

and of Abraham, who fulfilled [his summons]:
An Najm – The Star

that no bearer shall bear another’s burden,
An Najm – The Star

arabic text: وَأَن لَّيْسَ لِلْإِنسَانِ إِلَّا مَا سَعَىٰ
english translation text:
that nothing belongs to man except what he strives for,
An Najm – The Star

and that he will soon be shown his endeavour,
An Najm – The Star

then he will be rewarded for it with the fullest reward;
An Najm – The Star

that the terminus is toward your Lord,
An Najm – The Star

that it is He who makes [men] laugh, and weep,
An Najm – The Star

that it is He who brings death and gives life,
An Najm – The Star

that it is He who created the mates, the male and the female,
An Najm – The Star

from a drop of [seminal] fluid when emitted;
An Najm – The Star

that with Him lies the second genesis,
An Najm – The Star

that it is He who enriches and grants possessions,
An Najm – The Star

that it is He who is the Lord of Sirius;
An Najm – The Star

that it is He who destroyed the former ‘Ad,
An Najm – The Star

and Thamud, sparing none [of them];
An Najm – The Star

arabic text: وَقَوْمَ نُوحٍ مِّن قَبْلُ ۖ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا هُمْ أَظْلَمَ وَأَطْغَىٰ
english translation text:
and the people of Noah before that; indeed they were more unjust and rebellious;
An Najm – The Star

and He overthrew the town that was overturned,
An Najm – The Star

covering it with what covered it.
An Najm – The Star

Then which of the bounties of your Lord will you dispute?
An Najm – The Star

This is a warner, [in the tradition] of the warners of old.
An Najm – The Star

The Imminent [Hour] is near at hand.
An Najm – The Star

arabic text: لَيْسَ لَهَا مِن دُونِ اللَّهِ كَاشِفَةٌ
english translation text:
There is none who may unveil it besides Allah.
An Najm – The Star

Will you then wonder at this discourse,
An Najm – The Star

and laugh and not weep,
An Najm – The Star

while you remain heedless?!
An Najm – The Star

So prostrate yourselves to Allah and worship Him!
An Najm – The Star
WAJIB SAJADH
